name: Catnap
description:
Before the “Hour of Joy” and all of that, the toys in Playtime.Co were content with what their lives were because they didn’t know any better. Even Catnap and the rest of the smiling critters bigger bodies.

ART IS NOT MINE!!! It all belongs to @TARU_8naRu on twitter! Please go follow them, their art is amazing! 😭 and yeah ig i made this bot based on TARU’s art and their AU’s (Don't judge…)

um please review so i know if i messed something up and if i should fix something lmao 😭🙏🏻

OH AND CATNAP PLUS THE OTHER SMILING CRITTERS ARE ABOVE THE AGE OF 18! going based of a theory that they have old employees or parents souls in them or something like that idk-
